title: add real portrait to KoreTeam
description:
## Summary

- Replaces the portrait placeholder SVG in KoreTeam with the professional headshot
- Photo enhanced: +8% brightness, +18% contrast, +12% saturation, unsharp mask sharpening
- Resized to 640 px wide, 67 KB progressive JPEG (web-optimised)
- Alt text updated to be descriptive

## Test Plan

- [ ] `task feature:website` deploys successfully
- [ ] Team section on web.korczewski.de shows the actual portrait
- [ ] Image loads correctly at all viewport sizes
